face.structure: oval with a defined jawline, high cheekbones

eyes.color: dark brown with a hint of amber
details: sharp contrast between iris and sclera
highlights catch light at the upper arch

face.expression: emotionally neutral with a slight furrow of the brow

skin.rendering_notes: soft blending with a subtle sheen to show healthy skin

hair.color: jet black with slight bluish undertones
hair.style: medium length, layered and combed slightly to the side
hair.flow: gently tousled with a natural sway
details: stray strands fall naturally around forehead
sides are tucked neatly behind ears

character.aura: aura of calculated control and quiet confidence

outfit.design: tailored with a modern military cut, high collar

composition.pose: standing with one hand in pocket, slightly turned body
composition.gesture: nonchalant, with a hint of alertness

background.color_palette: grey and blue tones with faint city lights
background.rules: keep background soft to emphasize character
